LessonsCheatsheet GitHub
← All boss levels
Boss levelintermediate

Organize the mess

A flat folder of log files needs to be sorted into `archive/` and `errors/`. Use the tools you know.

Step 1 of 4

List the logs

Use `ls /home/learner/logs` to see what is in there.

SandboxEach command runs against a fresh seeded filesystem.

Type a command and press Enter. The command runs in a fresh VFS; the grading result appears in the left panel.

$

Built for learning Linux · open source · no signup, no tracking

Press g then l to jump to lessons
